impact.title: My Environmental Impact
impact.subtitle: Measure the positive impact of your learning

quality.congratulations: Congratulations! Your response meets quality standards

welcome.subtitle: This is your sponsor dashboard. See how your markets and Pulses perform, share links, and download reports.
welcome.step_1_pulse_desc: Craft a question with options and confidence metrics.
welcome.step_1_market_desc: Open your sponsored market and track live results.
welcome.step_2_desc: Use the Share section for links and QR codes for your audience.
welcome.step_3_desc: Printable PDF and per-market data from each card or Reports.
welcome.my_accounts_hint: Your dashboard is also accessible anytime from "My accounts" in the main menu, whenever you're signed in as {email}.

notifications.title: Email notifications
notifications.description: Pick which transactional emails you want to receive about your Pulse markets.
notifications.pulse_launch_hint: We'll ping you the moment your Pulse goes live, with the public link ready to share.
notifications.pulse_closure_hint: On close we send the leading answer, total voters, and a link to the full report.
notifications.fine_print: You can change these preferences anytime, or use the unsubscribe link in the footer of any email.

sponsor_markets.title: Sponsor markets
sponsor_markets.subtitle: You can also attach your brand to existing markets on the platform.

actions.title: What you can do
actions.create_pulse_desc: New multi-option question for your community (confidence + live results).
actions.reports_desc: Per-market PDF with results, confidence, and fund impact.
actions.share_desc: Public links, WhatsApp, and per-market QR codes.
actions.how_it_works_desc: Quick guide to the sponsor dashboard.

markets_list.title: Your markets
markets_list.empty_desc_pulse: Create your first Pulse or ask Crowd Conscious to link an existing market to your account.
markets_list.empty_desc_classic: Your sponsored market will appear here once linked to your account (or sponsor name).

fund_impact.title: Conscious Fund impact
fund_impact.description: Your sponsorship contributes to the Conscious Fund for community causes chosen by the community.
fund_impact.empty: Fund contributions appear here once sponsorship payments are processed.

upgrade.subtitle_pulse_unico: You have access to one Pulse. Here are the options to expand.
upgrade.subtitle_pulse_pack_under: You've used {used}/{max} Pulses. Upgrade to Suscripción for continuous access.
upgrade.subtitle_pulse_pack_full: You've used your full Pack ({max}/{max}). Renew your Pack or upgrade to Suscripción.
upgrade.subtitle_suscripcion: Your Suscripción is active. See additional options below.
upgrade.subtitle_mundial: Your Mundial Pack is active. See how to continue after the tournament.
upgrade.subtitle_enterprise: Contact us for adjustments to your Enterprise plan.
upgrade.subtitle_pilot: Your Pilot Pulse is live. Pick a plan to keep publishing questions.
upgrade.subtitle_legacy: These are the options available for your sponsor account.
upgrade.cta_error_generic: We couldn't start the checkout. Please try again.
upgrade.addon_body: Coming soon — contact us for now.
upgrade.need_help_body: Write us and we'll reply the same business day.
upgrade.success_subtitle_suscripcion: Your Suscripción is active. Start creating questions.
upgrade.success_subtitle_pulse_pack: Your Pulse Pack is active. You have 3 Pulses available.
upgrade.success_subtitle_pulse_unico: Your new Pulse Único is active.
upgrade.success_pending_body: We're confirming your payment with Stripe. This can take up to a minute — your new plan will appear in the dashboard as soon as it completes.

create_form.field_title_placeholder: e.g. What should be your team's #1 priority?
create_form.field_title_tip: Craft a clear, actionable question. e.g. 'Where should the borough invest first?'
create_form.field_logo_help: Appears as the brand on the Pulse (sponsor).
create_form.field_logo_tip: Shown as 'sponsored by [your brand]' on the Pulse card. PNG / JPG / WebP / GIF, up to 2MB.
create_form.field_cover_help: Optional; improves how it looks in listings and reports.
create_form.field_cover_tip: Optional but recommended. Shown when sharing to social media.
create_form.field_context_placeholder: Background and why this question matters.
create_form.field_context_tip: 1-2 short paragraphs explaining why this question matters.
create_form.field_resolution_placeholder: For public opinion: 'This Pulse is an opinion consultation; closes [date] with confidence-weighted analysis'. For objective outcomes, describe how the result is determined.
create_form.field_resolution_tip: For opinion Pulses, write: 'This Pulse is an opinion consultation. It closes on [date] with confidence-weighted result analysis.' For predictions with an objective outcome (e.g. 'Will X win the match?'), describe how the result is determined.
create_form.field_close_tip: Recommended: 14 days after launch at 23:59 CDMX.
create_form.field_options_tip: Minimum 2, recommended 4-5. Each option must be mutually exclusive of the others.
create_form.ai_subtitle: AI can suggest context, options, and criteria based on your question.
create_form.preview_subtitle: Here's how your Pulse will look in the public listing.
create_form.preview_empty: Add at least a title and two options to preview.
create_form.published_copy_link: Copy and share the public link

suggest_cause.title: Suggest a cause for the Fund
